name: Ginger Honey Roast Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Stuff the chicken with chopped ginger root.
3. Place the chicken on a baking tray in the oven.
4. Prepare the basting mixture by combining oil, soy sauce, honey, chopped chilies, and ground ginger.
5. Baste the chicken when it is 80% cooked.
6. Continue to baste frequently during the final stages of cooking to prevent the honey from burning.
